title: The Escalating Price of Intelligence: Rising Costs of Proprietary LLMs in 2026
description: Per-token prices look stable, but real LLM bills are climbing fast. A breakdown of why agentic workloads, longer context, and tokenizer changes are inflating costs — and what to do about it.
author: Teckxx

title: How Language Models "Think"
description: A technical breakdown — with interactive diagrams — of what actually happens when a language model processes input: forward pass mechanics, chain-of-thought, and trained extended reasoning.
author: Teckxx

title: Have We Reached Peak Attention?
description: The Transformer's attention mechanism has dominated AI for a decade. Now a wave of new architectures — SSMs, linear attention, xLSTM, and hybrids — is challenging its reign. Here's where the research stands.
author: Teckxx

title: Why Most AI Projects Fail (And How to Be the Exception)
description: The failure rate for enterprise AI is around 80%. After 30 years in the field, here are the five patterns I see over and over — and what to do instead.
author: Teckxx

title: Welcome to OK ROBOT
description: Introducing our blog — where we share what we've learned building AI systems that actually work.
author: Teckxx
